title: jurinea yakla
intro: Jurinea yakla, also known as Turkestan milk thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and liver-protective effects. The health benefits of Jurinea yakla include its ability to improve liver function, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
